competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Cursor changelog highlights (May 2026):

Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): Better at sustained work on long-running tasks, follows complex instructions more reliably. Double usage for first week.

Jira Integration (May 19, 2026): Assign work items to Cursor or mention @Cursor in a comment to kick off a cloud agent. Ask to fix bugs, add features, update tests. When the agent finishes, Jira shows completion updates and includes a link to the pull request.

Cursor Automations Enhancements: Cursor Automations in the Agents Window. Attach multiple repos to an automation so agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks.

Shared Canvases: Canvases are interactive artifacts created by agents, like reports, dashboards, and custom interfaces. Instead of sharing a full chat thread, you can share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser.

Bugbot Billing: Switches to usage-based billing, removing seat fees and adding configurable effort levels for deeper PR reviews or custom review logic.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Cursor changelog highlights (May 2026):

Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): Better at sustained wo

changes.description: Shared Canvases：可向团队分享 agent 生成的 canvas 快照链接，支持报告、仪表盘、自定义界面等 artifact 类型
changes.evidence: 「share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Cursor 正构建可分享的 agent artifact 链接层。「live snapshot」措辞仍是快照而非 live link，但方向直指 meee2 的跨工具 artifact 共享能力

changes.description: Cursor Automations 支持多 repo 绑定：单个 automation 可跨多个代码仓库推理和交付，代理跨 repo 执行、测试和验证任务
changes.evidence: 「attach multiple repos to an automation so agents reason across all required context and work across repos」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 repo、跨 owner 的 agent context pull，直接对应 meee2 的 F9 跨源 artifact pull 概念

changes.description: Jira 集成：在 Jira 中通过 @Cursor 触发云端 agent，完成后自动关联 PR 链接
changes.evidence: 「mention @Cursor in a comment to kick off a cloud agent... Jira shows completion updates and includes a link to the pull request」

changes.description: Composer 2.5 发布：更擅长长时任务的持续执行，复杂指令遵循能力提升
changes.evidence: 「better at sustained work on long-running tasks, follows complex instructions more reliably」

key_findings: Shared Canvases：Cursor 开始构建 agent artifact 的可分享链接层，方向直指「live artifact link」，当前仍是快照而非 live link
Multi-repo Automations：agent 可跨 repo 推理执行，触碰 meee2 跨 owner/跨工具 artifact pull 核心能力

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Claude.ai 2026 feature highlights:

Live Artifacts (April 2026): Artifacts ships on all paid plans and inside Projects. Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, making them useful for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking, and content calendars without manual updates.

Artifacts + MCP: Artifacts now support Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and more.

Projects: Organize chats into Projects with 200K context window, bringing together documents, code, and insights.

Managed Agents: Claude Developer Platform adds Managed Agents webhooks, multi-agent orchestration, and self-hosted sandboxes on AWS. Managed Agents can connect to private MCP servers.

Claude Code: Terminal-first agentic coding tool, generally available since 2025-05-22.

Overall feature surface: persistent workspaces (Projects, Artifacts, Memory, Cowork), agentic capabilities (Claude Code, Computer Use, Skills), reasoning controls (Extended Thinking), tool integration (MCP), platform integrations.

[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Claude.ai 2026 feature highlights:

Live Artifacts (April 2026): Artifacts ships on all paid plans and inside Pr

changes.description: Live Artifacts：artifact 自动以当前数据刷新，无需手动更新，直接实现「live link」语义
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Live Artifacts 是 Anthropic 对「live link」的直接实现——artifact 不再是快照，而是持续刷新的 live 数据视图。与 meee2「跨工具 artifact live link（不是 snapshot）」定义高度重叠

changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support MCP servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：artifact 通过 MCP 跨工具 pull 数据，实现跨服务的 artifact 数据来源聚合

changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：企业级 human+AI session 治理协议的基础设施层，但当前聚焦开发者平台而非终端用户体验层

key_findings: Live Artifacts（4月上线）：artifact 自动刷新为实时数据，是 Anthropic 对「live link」语义的首次直接落地，与 meee2 差异化锚点 #2 高度重叠
Artifacts + MCP 跨工具数据连接：artifact 可通过 MCP 直连 Gmail/Calendar/Slack，触碰跨工具 artifact pull 能力（锚点 #4）

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
GitHub Copilot Features (May 2026):

Agent Mode: "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background." Supports third-party agents.

Copilot Spaces: "Turn Copilot into a project expert" by creating "a shared source of truth that includes context from your docs and repositories."

Enterprise Controls: "Track activity with detailed audit logs and enforce governance by managing agents from a single control plane." MCP server access control via allow lists to "prevent unauthorized access."

CLI: "Direct Copilot in the terminal using natural language and watch it plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by your GitHub context."

Context: Examines code in editor including "other files open in your editor" for contextualized suggestions.

Data: Business/Enterprise: "Prompts and Suggestions: Not retained" while "User Engagement Data: Kept for two years."
competitors.content_hash:
GitHub Copilot Features (May 2026):

Agent Mode: "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them

changes.description: MCP server 访问控制：通过 allow list 限制 MCP server 授权访问，防止未经授权的连接
changes.evidence: 「MCP server access control via allow lists to prevent unauthorized access」

key_findings: 新增 MCP server allow-list 访问控制，增强企业级安全治理能力
Copilot Spaces 表述从「scale knowledge」回归「project expert」定位，核心功能无结构性变化

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Linear 2026 changelog highlights:

Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta): Works in online/mobile/desktop app and as plug-in for Slack, Teams, Zendesk. Agent and Skills included on all plans. Save conversations as reusable Skills for recurring workflows.

Code Intelligence (May 14, 2026): Extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase. Supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications.

AI Coding Tools Integration (Feb 2026): Launch preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue, with prefilled prompt including issue ID, description, comments, updates, linked references, and images.

Linear Diffs (May 27, 2026): Review diffs from any issue with a PR, iterate on further changes with agents, ship code from Linear. Guided reviews show core of change first with explanations. Agent changes update the diff in real-time. All reviews sync back to GitHub.

Project Slack channels (May 21, 2026): Dedicated Slack channel integration for Linear projects.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Linear 2026 changelog highlights:

Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta): Works in online/mobile/deskt

changes.description: Linear Diffs（5月27日）：在 Linear issue 内直接做 PR 代码审查，agent 修改后 diff 实时更新，无需本地 checkout
changes.evidence: 「Agent changes update the diff in real-time, so you don't need to check out the branch locally」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Linear Diffs 中 diff artifact 随 agent 执行实时更新，是「live link」语义在 code review 场景的直接落地

changes.description: AI 编码工具深链：从 Linear issue 一键启动编码工具，携带完整 issue 上下文（描述、评论、图片、linked references）
changes.evidence: 「launch your preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue, with a prefilled prompt that includes the issue ID and all relevant context」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具携带完整 issue artifact 上下文，触碰 meee2 的跨工具 artifact pull（F9）能力

changes.description: Code Intelligence（5月14日）：Linear Agent 具备代码库理解能力，支持代码感知任务（诊断功能、设计技术规格）
changes.evidence: 「extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase and supports code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality」

key_findings: Linear Diffs（5月27日）：diff artifact 随 agent 修改实时更新，是「live link」语义的 code review 实现，与 meee2 锚点 #2 直接重叠
Linear 正完成从项目管理工具到「带 live artifact 的 agent 协作层」的转型：Agent + Code Intelligence + Diffs + 编码工具深链

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Notion 2026 feature highlights:

Developer Platform (May 13, 2026, v3.5): External Agents API brings favorite agents (Claude, Codex, Decagon) into Notion. Workers: hosted runtime for custom code, deploy via CLI, run in secure sandbox. Database Sync: sync any data source via API into Notion databases with no servers (powered by Workers). Beta free, starting August 11 on Notion credits.

Notion MCP (April 2026): Connections to external apps via Model Context Protocol with pre-configured partner integrations including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, and Sentry.

Custom Agents (since Feb 2026): Over 1 million agents built. Agents 35-50% cheaper. Gained access to private Slack channels, Salesforce and Box connectors.

TechCrunch (May 13, 2026): "Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents" — connects with external agents and builds automated multistep workflows pulling data from any database.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Notion 2026 feature highlights:

Developer Platform (May 13, 2026, v3.5): External Agents API brings fav

changes.description: Developer Platform（v3.5，5月13日）：External Agents API 允许第三方 agent 接入 Notion，Notion 正式成为 agent hub
changes.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」（TechCrunch, 2026-05-13）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Notion 正构建跨 agent 的统一协作层，方向与 meee2「人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议」定位相近

changes.description: Database Sync：通过 API 将任意外部数据源同步到 Notion 数据库，无需自建服务器
changes.evidence: 「sync any data source with an API into your Notion databases with no servers for your team to manage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具数据源的 live sync，趋向「live link」而非 snapshot 语义

changes.description: Notion MCP：通过 MCP 协议预配置 12+ 合作伙伴集成（Linear、Figma、GitHub、Stripe 等）
changes.evidence: 「Notion MCP allows connections to external apps via MCP with pre-configured partner integrations including Linear, Figma, HubSpot」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull 的 MCP 实现，Notion 作为 hub 聚合多工具数据

key_findings: 威胁等级上升 md → hi。Notion 通过 Developer Platform + External Agents API + Database Sync + Notion MCP 四重能力，正在成为跨工具 agent hub，触碰 meee2 锚点 #1/#2/#4
TechCrunch 标题直接定性「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」，是向 meee2 定位延伸的明确信号

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Slack AI 2026 highlights:

Generate AI Response in Workflow Builder: AI is native in any workflow. Write a prompt and point it at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists) to let an LLM do the work. Summarize threads, translate messages, or draft replies.

Slackbot Canvas: Salesforce rebuilt Slackbot as fully powered AI agent. Slackbot can synthesize information into a Canvas (Slack's collaborative document format) — iterate on it, refine it with Slackbot, or share it out with team.

AI writing assistance in Canvas: AI can instantly summarize key points, extract action items, and generate a first draft from any Slack conversation.

Developer tools for custom agents: Single 'slack create agent' command, Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM flexibility. Open-source Starter Agent and Support Agent sample apps. Support for Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI.

[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Slack AI 2026 highlights:

Generate AI Response in Workflow Builder: AI is native in any workflow. Writ

changes.description: Slackbot 重构为 Canvas 合成 agent：可将会话内容合成为 Canvas 文档，支持迭代优化和分享
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot can synthesize information into a Canvas — Slack's collaborative document format — where you can iterate on it」

changes.description: Workflow Builder 内置 AI Response 步骤，可指向 channels/canvases/lists 等知识源生成 LLM 响应
changes.evidence: 「Generate AI Response step: write a prompt and point it at your knowledge sources — channels, canvases, lists — to let an LLM do the work」

key_findings: Slackbot 升级为可合成 Canvas 的 agent，Canvas 成为 AI 输出的 artifact 容器，但仍是文档范式而非 descriptive-first 的 session 范式
自定义 agent 开发工具链开放（bring-your-own-LLM），Slack 成为企业 agent 平台而非 workspace 协议层

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Reflect 2026 feature highlights:

AI model support: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. AI voice transcriber, AI assistant, and chat with notes using latest models.

Mobile AI: AI palette editor accessible via mobile iPhone app.

Auto-backlinks: Select a paragraph of text and automatically add backlinks by highlighting selection within a note.

Real-time sync: Notes sync in real-time across devices including iOS, with offline capabilities. Images available offline, sync when back online.

Advanced search: Chat with your notes using AI — described as 'like talking directly with your brain.'

Link saving: Save a link via Chrome extension or phone, Reflect auto-generates an AI summary of the page.

Reflect 2026 feature highlights:

AI model support: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. AI voice transcriber, AI

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Raycast 2026 changelog highlights:

Agents (renamed from Presets): Reused across chats. Update configuration once, change applies everywhere.

Memory: Chats remember context about you. Profile: jot down role, tools, communication style. Memory = automatic summary built from conversations over time, picking up projects, preferences, goals.

Skills: Custom instructions and knowledge for tasks you do often. Skills and AI Extensions loaded dynamically when relevant.

MCP HTTP Servers (experimental): Support for HTTP MCP servers using SSE and Streamable protocols.

GitHub Copilot integration: Assign issues to Copilot coding agent from Raycast. Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast.

Public beta (May 2026): New UI, files & folders on root search, AI dictation system-wide. OpenRouter support. Ollama tool calling with local models.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Raycast 2026 changelog highlights:

Agents (renamed from Presets): Reused across chats. Update configurati

changes.description: Copilot agent 日志实时监控：在 Raycast launcher 中直接监看后台 Copilot agent 的执行日志
changes.evidence: 「Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast」（GitHub Changelog, 2026-03-20）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：菜单栏/launcher 作为 peripheral 层监控 background agent session，与 meee2「不切焦点、5 字戳任何 session」的 peripheral 设计理念接近

changes.description: Memory + Skills 系统：全局用户上下文记忆 + 动态加载的 task-specific 技能，跨会话保持感知
changes.evidence: 「Memory is an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time, picking up on your projects, preferences, and goals」

key_findings: Raycast 强化 peripheral 层的 agent 监控能力：可在 launcher 中实时查看 Copilot agent 执行日志，接近 meee2 peripheral 层设计
Presets → Agents 更名 + Memory/Skills 系统：Raycast 向 persistent AI assistant 方向演化，但仍是 launcher 范式

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Replit 2026 highlights:

Agent 4 (March 2026): Multiple agents tackle different parts of project at once (auth, database, backend, frontend). For large tasks, Agent 4 automatically breaks into smaller forks, runs concurrently using sub-agents, merges results.

Shared sessions: Teammates can work in own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Every request broken into discrete tasks that run in background.

May 2026 updates: Enterprise onboarding with online purchase and automated SSO setup. Per-user spend limits for workspaces. PNG exports for Canvas frames. Nine ready-to-use connectors. Four new MCP servers.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Replit 2026 highlights:

Agent 4 (March 2026): Multiple agents tackle different parts of project at once

changes.description: Shared sessions with agent：多个团队成员可在共享 session 中与 agent 协同工作，请求在后台分解为离散任务并行执行
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：shared session 中人与 agent 共同参与，靠近「人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议」定义，但 Replit 的 session 仍以代码项目为粒度

changes.description: Multi-agent 并发执行：大任务自动分解为子任务，多个 sub-agent 并行执行后合并结果
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results」

key_findings: Replit Agent 4 引入 shared session 概念：人与 agent 在同一 session 中协作，但聚焦代码项目粒度，与 meee2 的 workspace-level session 协议不同

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Superwhisper 2026 highlights:

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app without touching keyboard. Drive an entire fleet of agents faster than you can type.

Enhanced AI model support: Gemini and Grok (remote cloud), GPT 5.1 and Opus 4.5 support. Enhanced Gemini language support.

UI: New design for Modes with dedicated settings view. Improved activation flow. Onboarding toasts.

Real-time transcription: Realtime streaming UI with live transcription display.

Recording retention: Automatically cleans up old recordings on configurable schedule. Per-mode autocapitalize toggle.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文]

Superwhisper 2026 highlights:

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Use S

changes.description: agentic coding 工具集成：通过语音驱动 Cursor/Claude Code/Codex 等 agent，无需键盘操作
changes.evidence: 「use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app, without touching your keyboard」

key_findings: Superwhisper 向「语音 peripheral 层」演化，可驱动多个 coding agent，但定位是语音输入工具而非 workspace 协议

alerts.headline: Shared Canvases：Cursor 开始构建 agent artifact 可分享链接层，方向指向 live artifact link
alerts.evidence: 「share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser」
alerts.action_suggestion: 密切观察 Shared Canvases 是否从「live snapshot」升级为真正的 live link（实时同步而非快照）。若 Cursor 将 canvas 从快照变为 live feed，将直接复制 meee2 锚点 #2。建议加速 meee2 live link 的 public 表述，强化「not a snapshot」的差异化叙事

alerts.headline: Multi-repo Automations：agent 可跨 repo 推理执行，触碰 meee2 跨 owner/跨工具 artifact pull 核心
alerts.evidence: 「attach multiple repos to an automation so agents reason across all required context and work across repos」
alerts.action_suggestion: 关注 Cursor Automations 是否延伸到非代码 artifact（文档、设计、数据）。目前仅限于代码 repo，meee2 的差异化在于跨工具（而非跨 repo）的 artifact pull

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts：Anthropic 直接落地「live link」语义——artifact 随实时数据自动刷新
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them」
alerts.action_suggestion: 这是 meee2 锚点 #2 的最直接威胁。建议 meee2 明确「live link」的更宽定义：不仅是数据刷新，而是跨工具 session 间的 artifact 双向同步（写回能力），突出 Claude.ai 暂不具备的「跨工具、双向 live」特性

alerts.headline: Artifacts + MCP：artifact 可直连 Gmail/Calendar/Slack，跨工具数据 pull 在 Claude.ai 落地
alerts.evidence: 「Artifacts now support MCP servers, enabling direct connections to external services like Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack」
alerts.action_suggestion: Artifacts + MCP 使 Claude.ai artifact 具备跨工具数据来源，触碰 meee2 锚点 #4。建议强化「F9 pull 是 user-initiated、有语义的跨工具 pull」与「MCP 连接是 schema-level 数据拉取」的差异

alerts.headline: Linear Diffs（5月27日）：diff artifact 随 agent 修改实时更新，「live link」概念进入 code review 层
alerts.evidence: 「Agent changes update the diff in real-time, so you don't need to check out the branch locally」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 正从 issue tracker 演化为带 live artifact 的 agent 协作层。观察 Linear Diffs 是否扩展到 code 以外的 artifact（设计稿、文档）。若扩展，Linear 将成为 meee2 核心场景的直接竞争者

alerts.headline: 威胁升级 md→hi：Notion Developer Platform 将 Notion 变为 agent hub，触碰 meee2 锚点 #1/#2/#4
alerts.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」（TechCrunch, 2026-05-13）
alerts.action_suggestion: Notion 的 External Agents API + Database Sync + Notion MCP 组合使其成为具备跨工具 agent 集成能力的 hub。关注 Notion 是否引入 session 级治理（人+AI 同协议），若出现，威胁等级需再次评估是否升至 crit
